title: Tracks 25 and 26 and Intrumentality
wikitext:
[]: Tracks 25 & 26 and Intrumentality             Quote Post by RandomStuff » Sun Mar 16, 2008 2:15 pm I suddenly realized last night that the tracks that Shinji more often than not listens to on his cassette player coincide with the instrumentality episodes.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sun Mar 16, 2008 2:16 pm I don't know how many tracks DAT players are supposed to have on them. I think the point is just showing "he reached the end of the tape, he listened to the entire thing, and he's rewinding again" (that is to say, he didn't pick "26" it just happens to be the end) but I'm not sure

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Mar 16, 2008 2:21 pm It was mentioned in some of the commentary of evil

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 16, 2008 2:27 pm http://www.evacommentary.org/appendix/02_sdat.html

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Mar 17, 2008 12:02 pm We mentioned it in the Audio Commentary as well.

Article: Tracks 25 and 26 and Intrumentality
[]: Tracks 25 & 26 and Intrumentality             Quote Post by RandomStuff » Sun Mar 16, 2008 2:15 pm I suddenly realized last night that the tracks that Shinji more often than not listens to on his cassette player coincide with the instrumentality episodes.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sun Mar 16, 2008 2:16 pm I don't know how many tracks DAT players are supposed to have on them. I think the point is just showing "he reached the end of the tape, he listened to the entire thing, and he's rewinding again" (that is to say, he didn't pick "26" it just happens to be the end) but I'm not sure

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Mar 16, 2008 2:21 pm It was mentioned in some of the commentary of evil

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 16, 2008 2:27 pm http://www.evacommentary.org/appendix/02_sdat.html

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Mar 17, 2008 12:02 pm We mentioned it in the Audio Commentary as well.
